title: ophrys tenthredinifera subsp. dictynnae
side_effects: Ophrys tenthredinifera subsp. dictynnae can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, or interactions with other medications. Ingesting large quantities of this plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as cause skin irritation and rashes in individuals with sensitive skin. Additionally, its improper use may also result in an increased heart rate, anxiety, and restlessness due to potential phytochemical interactions with the body's systems. If not handled correctly, Ophrys tenthredinifera subsp. dictynnae can also cause more severe health issues, such as respiratory problems or seizures in rare cases.
